add_executable(dummy_lib_tests greet_test.cpp)

target_link_libraries(dummy_lib_tests
    PRIVATE
        dummy_lib
        project_feature_flags
        GTest::gtest_main)

# BuildInfoHelper.h is in the same include dir as BuildInfo.h (generated by target_generate_build_info)
# dummy_lib already has it via its PUBLIC include dirs — no extra include needed.

set_project_warnings(dummy_lib_tests)

# Tests may include generated headers and exercise constants; instead of
# disabling analyzers entirely we apply a relaxed analyzer configuration so
# they run but do not treat warnings as errors or fail the build.
apply_relaxed_analyzers(dummy_lib_tests)

add_test(NAME dummy_lib_tests COMMAND dummy_lib_tests)
